conjecture: If there are a finite-dimensional Hilbert space K, a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding j:B(H)_sa->B(K)_sa, and a unital positive C:B(K)_sa->B(H)_sa with Phi=Cj whose lift F=jC extends to a UCP map B(K)->B(K) with ||F^2-F||_cb <= eta, then with P=theta(2Phi-1), A=Im P, a•b=P(a∘b), the algebra A is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra (by reduction to Kitaev's CP theorem for F).
author: agent-B
